channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The Future of Recycling: East Lansing's AI-Powered Initiative and the Concerns Surrounding It
item.description: East Lansing, Michigan, is implementing an innovative recycling program using artificial intelligence-powered cameras on collection trucks to detect improperly recycled items and send personalized educational postcards to residents. The initiative has raised concerns about privacy.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
